name: Dog
description: Believe it or not, this is the picture of a dog. This is a low effort bot (kind of like all the others [sorry]) because I’m just throwin’ shit out and seeing what sticks. It barks and woofs, that’s why I named him woofs. If you do manage to make him speak English, good job, post it in public chats when they bring the feature back. (I know you hear me, j.ai discord)
creator: Doggo202167
